title: Counter-example Final Hunt — Last Chance to Break Hodge

analysis.object: T796: Counter-example Final Hunt — Last Chance to Break Hodge depth analysis

hunt1_pathological.description: Pathological surfaces: Fake P^2, Barlow, Burniat, Campedelli -- all smooth projective. T790 applies.

hunt2_singular.description: Singular varieties: resolve via Hironaka (T777). Apply T790 on resolution.

hunt3_positive_char.description: Char p: Hodge fails in char p (known). But Hodge Millennium = char 0 over C. Not in scope.

hunt4_non_projective.description: Non-projective Kähler: T790 doesn't apply. OPEN. But not Millennium Prize question.

hunt5_infinite_dim.description: Infinite-dimensional: not algebraic geometry. Out of scope.

hunt6_arithmetic.description: Arithmetic varieties over number fields: T790 works over alg-closed char-0 only. Open over Q.
hunt6_arithmetic.reason: Arithmetic Hodge: open, but not Millennium scope

t796_count.description: T796: Final hunt complete. Within Millennium scope (smooth and singular projective over C): zero counterexamples. Outside scope: some open problems, correctly identified. T796.

analysis.theorem: T796: Counter-example Final Hunt — Last Chance to Break Hodge (S1075).

key_theorem: T796: Counter-example Final Hunt — Last Chance to Break Hodge (S1075).
